discussion_comments.comment_body:
Can we use the tag instead of the hash?

```suggestion
      - uses: actions/checkout@4

      - uses: hadolint/hadolint-action@3.1.0
```

discussion_comments.comment_body:
That's not really recommended by OpenSSF, see https://securityscorecards.dev/viewer/?uri=github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid

You can learn more about it in https://github.com/ossf/scorecard/blob/d8ba4268bf430b67b5421cd6b8d7ff90fd3868b0/docs/checks.md#pinned-dependencies 

By the way dependabot is handeling this greatly so when there is a new version the comment is also updated
